instructions.text: The code to review may or may not be provided. If not provided, you must locate it using tools and then read it.
The code is not directly provided, first use grep_tool to find the file(s) matching the requested name (e.g., 'AgentData.java'). Search from the current working directory or from the project root.
Once the file is found, use file_reader_tool to read its content.
You have the code content, review it for SOLID principles.
Comment on any violations of SOLID principles.
Review the code for DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself).
Suggest refactoring if duplicate code is found.
